title: CNMTCCO LED Candle Lights, 24Pcs Realistic Bright Flickering Tea Light, Battery Operated Flameless LED Candles, Electric Fake Candle in Warm White and Wave Open (Classic Candles)
features: 【Romantic And Welcome】- The flickering bulb flameless LED tea light is ideal for decorations, it can be used as an ambient light with other holders such as incense burner holders or glasses. You can put the battery tea light on the table or other places, such as restaurants, home and garden, wedding, party, Valentine's Day, mother's day, Easter, christmas decorations and so on.

【Extra Long Life】- 40 times longer than traditional wax tealights and 3 times longer than some cheap tealights with 80 hours/100 mAh batteries, sustainable work for 200 hours, the extra power and sturdy quality will bring more possibilities.

【Flameless Fake Candle】- These battery operated LED candles lights are safe for children, pets and the elderlyNo flames to worry about, no fire hazard or risk of burning, safe for homes with pets or young children.
【Life-Like Charm】 - Each LED fake candle is ready to use right out of the box.CNMTCCO's LED tealights mimic real candles with soft flickering and melting edges adding a cosy and warm ambience.

【Widely Applied for Decoration】 You can place the battery tealight on the dining table or elsewhere in the dining room or home. Ideal for Valentine's Day, Ramadan, christmas decoration, wedding centrepieces, moro lamps, mason jars to bring warmth and cheer on a dark and stormy night!
description: Product Description CNMTCCO specialises in a wide range of flameless LED candles, with proven manufacturing techniques and quality material sources, all of which ensure that we can bring reliable products and services to our customers. CNMTCCO 24 Pack Battery Tea Lights, Lasts 3X Longer, 250+Hours Specification Material： LED+PP Size: 3.5 cm (diameter) x 4 cm (height) Battery： LR1130 button cell (pre-installed) Battery life: over 250 hours Light Colour: Warm White Voltage: 1.5 volts Package includes： 24 X LED tealight candles USE IT EVERYWHERE in the kitchen on pre-dawn (and pre-coffee) mornings, in the bedroom when you're relaxing in the evening, and in the bathroom as a nightlight. The Family Memory Tealight is a great way to add a beautiful glow to any room. SAFER, EASIER ALTERNATIVE With realistic flickering light effects and warm tones, these tealights can add beauty to any space without creating a messy wax or fire hazard. Perfect for those with children or pets in the home. THE RIGHT SIZE They work perfectly on their own, so you can place them on dining tables, outdoor patios, coffee tables, and anywhere you need a little light. Solves All of The Following Problems 1 .Ideal size to fit any standard incense holder 2 .Subtle flickering instead of annoying flickering 3 .Fused edge design and flickering light make the CNMTCCO Battery Tea Light Candle even more vivid and lovely Ideal for Festive Decorations These electronic tea lights can also be given as gifts or party favours. They are easy to carry and can be used for a long time without changing batteries. Creating A Wonderful Ambience 1 .Real candles don't last long 2. The hassle of having to deal with melted wax 3 .Cute curious kids or pets knocking candles over 4 .Blown out by the breeze
